Transmission: Dual Hydro-Gear® 4400 Series High-Performance Integrated Drive Systems
Short Description: The Rebel brings Bad Boy's signature commercial-grade power home at a price designed for homeowners, giving your yard a professional-quality cut every time.

Transmission: Dual Hydro-Gear 3100 Series Integrated Drive Systems
Short Description: The ZT Elite has long been our biggest seller — built as tough as they come with our patented front suspension and superior comfort, for a quality cut at an even better price.

The ZT Avenger is our biggest value for the residential homeowner — the same build quality and durability as every Bad Boy mower before it, with all the power and performance you'd expect, at a price you probably wouldn't.

The Maverick is unlike any mower in its class — built and outfitted commercial-grade tough, with popular power options and superior comfort, at the best price for homeowners who want more from their mower.
Most mowers in this price range are stamped from flimsy steel and bolted together. The MZ Magnum is built right alongside our commercial mowers, with the same professional build quality.

Drive: Dual Hydro-Gear 2800 Performance Integrated Drive Systems
Transmission: Dual Hydro-Gear 2800 Performance Integrated Drive Systems
Short Description: We modified the Revolt to make the perfect stand-on mower for any homeowner — a better value for smaller properties with the same premium quality you expect from Bad Boy.
The MZ Rambler is Bad Boy's smallest zero-turn — compact and agile, with the heaviest-built deck in its class for long-lasting durability.
The Rogue's patented EZ-Ride 3-link trailing suspension is the first and only of its kind — a smoother ride, more consistent tire contact and increased traction for a legendary mowing experience.
We turned the Rebel up a notch with our latest innovation. The Rebel X sports a sleek new look with upgrades that change the game once again.
The Renegade's cast-iron I-Beam front suspension and revolutionary 3-link rear suspension combine with the industry's strongest front rail and forks for the smoothest ride possible.
The Revolt's shorter frame and curved I-Beam front fork give you a lower center of gravity for maximum maneuverability and visibility — an unbelievably smooth ride no other stand-on mower can match.

The Renegade Diesel works hard so you don't have to — 1100cc of diesel torque for pure, long-lasting, brute-force performance.
The Raider is a budget-friendly zero-turn that doesn't skimp on performance — packing patented innovation and Bad Boy-exclusive features into an affordable package.
Meet Bad Boy's first electric zero-turn mower. We added a quiet and powerful electric drive to give you a new way to mow with an attitude.
